raw_text:
59. Aerospace Tooling Specialist

Job Summary  
Develops and manages tooling used in aerospace manufacturing, ensuring high precision and 
compliance with strict standards.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Design and develop aerospace to oling  
• Ensure compliance with aerospace standards (AS9100, etc.)  
• Perform high -precision inspections and validations  
• Support production and assembly processes  
• Maintain documentation and traceability  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of aerospace materials and processes  
• High -precision machining and inspection expertise  
• Strong documentation and compliance knowledge  
• Analytical and problem -solving skills  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Aerospace  
Experience  
• 5–10 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹50,000 – ₹1,00,000 per month
